title: Legacy inline annotation marker migrator to structured annotations
purpose: Converts legacy HTML comment-based annotation markers in markdown into structured Annotation records and cleans up the markdown.
module_context: Defines regex patterns for legacy annotation markers and exports functions to detect and migrate annotations.

steps.content: Test the input markdown against each legacy pattern in the collection.
Return true if any pattern matches the markdown.
Return false if no patterns match the markdown.
Initialize an empty array to collect extracted annotations.
Copy the input markdown to a working variable.
Process comment-start/end markers and extract comment annotations.
Process propose/approve-start/end markers and extract proposed/approved annotations.
Process reject-start/end markers and extract rejected annotations with reasons.
Remove standalone comment and status markers from the markdown.
Collapse multiple consecutive blank lines into double line breaks.
Return the cleaned markdown and extracted annotations.
